name: core-steps-skills-directive
description: All 6 hooks/core-steps/*.md files include a ## Skills section directing agents to check/use Skills before manual work. _format_discovered_skills() uses ## Available Skills heading for visibility. Spec conformance tests verify presence.

content: disable-model-invocation: true removed from 22 agent-scoped skills (QA 8, Dev 3, SM 5, Arch 6) to allow Skill tool invocation. Kept on 10 dev-tools: validate, version-bump, byos, skill-builder, hooks-manager, agent-builder, init-context, conductor, brain, jira.

discover_prism_skills scans 5 sources: story_root/.claude/skills, cwd/.claude/skills, home/.claude/skills, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills (env var from hook runtime), and ~/.claude/plugins/cache/*/*/*/skills (all installed plugins). Deduplicates by both directory path (seen_dirs) and skill name (seen_names). CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT scanned before cache so active plugin version takes priority.
